About Me

Core skills, strengths & what drives my work in AI data annotation.

Accuracy Rate90–92%
Tools Mastered4 platforms
Productivity7.5+ hrs/day

I am a Chemistry student at Moi University, expecting to graduate in December 2026. Over the past year, I have built solid hands-on experience in data annotation through my role at CloudFactory International and through freelance work running in parallel.

Working with tools like SuperAnnotate, CVAT, Lensor Tool, and Fast-Label has given me a strong grounding in preparing high-quality datasets for AI model training — work I find genuinely engaging.

Serving as Chairperson of the Science Students Association gave me real responsibility early on — managing a student body, working with faculty, and keeping events running smoothly.

I am someone who takes their work seriously, picks up new tools quickly, and shows up consistently. I am looking to bring that same focus and reliability to a team where precision and attention to detail genuinely matter.

Work Evidence

Real screenshots from live annotation projects. Click any image to enlarge.

CVAT – Power Line & Vegetation Annotation

90% accuracy

Labelled complex aerial power line datasets with polygon annotations. Classes include Vegetation, Top Rot & Splinters, Cross Arms, Equipment Damage and Fuse — handling 5–30 objects per image with 90%+ accuracy tracked via Time Doctor (7.5+ hrs/day).

Fast Label – Multi-Class Segmentation

85% accuracy · 40 tasks/week

Polygon-based segmentation for cars, trucks, buses, motorcycles, vegetation, buildings, roads, traffic signs/lights and lanelines (solid/dashed). Delivered 5–80 classes per task in 50–60 minutes each, with review-time evidence shown above.

SuperbAI – Next Vision Project

92% accuracy · 738 images in 3 days

Annotation guidelines followed

Power line equipment annotation

Classification production task

Top Rot & Wood Splintering detection on utility poles and switches. Gate & Door project (open/closed state) using bounding boxes on images & videos. High-volume delivery: 738 images completed in just 3 days at 92% accuracy.

Lensor – Industrial Damage Assessment

High-precision visual QA

Identified scratches, dents, rust, and structural damage on industrial trucks and containers using detailed damage annotation and blueprint overlays. Work involves pinpointing exact damage zones on vehicle panels with high precision.
